title: RapidMeta Infectious Disease | Long-Acting Injectable PrEP NMA (Cabotegravir + Lenacapavir) v1.0
hero_h2: Long-Acting Injectable PrEP Network Meta-Analysis (Cabotegravir + Lenacapavir)
nyt_headline: The Long-Acting Injectable HIV PrEP Evidence

pico.pop: Adults at substantial risk of HIV infection: cisgender men who have sex with men, transgender women, transgender men, gender non-conforming individuals, and cisgender women (especially adolescent girls and young women in sub-Saharan Africa)
pico.int: Long-acting injectable PrEP: cabotegravir 600 mg IM every 8 weeks (HPTN 083 / 084) or lenacapavir 927 mg SC every 26 weeks (PURPOSE-1 / PURPOSE-2)
pico.comp: Daily oral PrEP: emtricitabine + tenofovir disoproxil fumarate (F/TDF, Truvada) or emtricitabine + tenofovir alafenamide (F/TAF, Descovy)
pico.out: Incident HIV infection (primary, count of new infections by intention-to-treat)
pico.subgroup: Sex / gender, age (especially adolescent girls and young women), region (sub-Saharan Africa vs other), background incidence in oral-PrEP comparator arm

real_data_entries.name: HPTN 083
real_data_entries.group: Cabotegravir LA Q8W vs daily oral F/TDF in cisgender MSM and transgender women (multi-region: US / Latin America / sub-Saharan Africa / Asia); incident HIV infections

allOutcomes.title: Incident HIV infection (primary, fewer is better)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Landovitz RJ et al. NEJM 2021;385:595-608 (HPTN 083 cabotegravir LA in MSM/TGW).

real_data_entries.name: HPTN 084
real_data_entries.group: Cabotegravir LA Q8W vs daily oral F/TDF in cisgender women in 7 countries in sub-Saharan Africa (Botswana, Eswatini, Kenya, Malawi, South Africa, Uganda, Zimbabwe)

allOutcomes.title: Incident HIV infection (primary, fewer is better)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Delany-Moretlwe S et al. Lancet 2022;399:1779-1789 (HPTN 084 cabotegravir LA in women SSA).

real_data_entries.name: PURPOSE-1
real_data_entries.group: Lenacapavir 927 mg SC Q26W vs daily oral F/TAF (Descovy) in cisgender adolescent girls and young women age 16-25 in South Africa and Uganda

allOutcomes.title: Incident HIV infection (primary; 0 infections in lenacapavir arm)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Bekker LG et al. NEJM 2024;391:1179-1192 (PURPOSE-1 lenacapavir in young women SSA).

real_data_entries.name: PURPOSE-2
real_data_entries.group: Lenacapavir 927 mg SC Q26W vs daily oral F/TDF (Truvada) in cisgender MSM, transgender women, transgender men, and gender non-conforming individuals (multi-region)
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Kelley CF et al. NEJM 2024 (PURPOSE-2 lenacapavir in MSM/TGW).
